extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won stage 5 sprint after TARAMAE Rein crashed 11km from finish, losing red jersey to ELISSONDE Kenny who inherited lead without gaining time.
tactical_patterns: UAE led out through final 1.6km but DECEUNINCK sat on wheels refusing to work, timing entry perfectly at 1km.
PHILIPSEN's teammate ASGREEN pulled off with ~300m remaining, sacrificing leadout early but PHILIPSEN still won comfortably.
Wind direction change at 50km created crosswind risk window that teams ignored, focusing only on sprint positioning.

rider_signals.TARAMAE Rein: negative: crashed 11km out despite being well-positioned near front on wide boulevard, suggesting positioning alone insufficient on sprint stages
rider_signals.JACOBSEN Fabio: negative: DECEUNINCK executed perfect positioning strategy but JACOBSEN was too far back when sprint opened, missing wheels
rider_signals.MOLANO Juan Sebastian: positive: UAE committed full leadout from 1.6km but MOLANO still finished 4th, showing depth but not winning speed
